mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workout_log (member_id, date) SELECT m.id, CURDATE() FROM member m INNER JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM workout_log wl2 WHERE wl2.member_id = m.id AND wl2.date = CURDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(wl.date, '%a') AS d FROM workout_log wl INNER JOIN member m ON wl.member_id = m.id INNER JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{userId} AND YEARWEEK(wl.date, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1) GROUP BY wl.date

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT wl.date) FROM workout_log wl INNER JOIN member m ON wl.member_id = m.id INNER JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{userId} AND wl.date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT wl.date) FROM workout_log wl INNER JOIN member m ON wl.member_id = m.id INNER JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{userId}
